nasb.text: And Jesus *said to him, “Truly I say to you, that this very night, before a rooster crows twice, you yourself will deny Me three times.”

esv.text: And Jesus said to him, “Truly, I tell you, this very night, before the rooster crows twice, you will deny me three times.”

cnv.text: 耶穌對他說：“我實在告訴你，就在今天晚上，雞叫兩遍以前，你會三次不認我。”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“我实在告诉你，就在今天晚上鸡叫两次以前，你会三次不认我。”

csbs.text: 可是耶稣对他说：“我确实地告诉你：今天，就在今夜，鸡叫两遍以前，你会三次不认我。”
